title: fagara khasyana
intro: Fagara khasyana, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Fagara khasyana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, derived from the essential oils and alkaloids present in the plant. The health benefits of Fagara khasyana include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and support digestion, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Fagara khasyana is often prepared as a tea, powder, or extract for medicinal use, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal wine.
